name: ue54_material_node_edit
description: Official ArtClaw skill for Material node graph write operations. Create, delete, connect, edit MaterialExpression nodes. Create new Material assets, set material properties, recompile with auto-validation.
author: Ivan(杨己力)

tools.name: create_material
tools.description: Create a new empty Material asset. Provide asset_name and package_path.

tools.name: create_material_expression
tools.description: Create a MaterialExpression node in a Material's node graph. Provide material_path, expression_class, pos_x, pos_y.

tools.name: delete_material_expression
tools.description: Delete a MaterialExpression node from a Material's node graph. Provide material_path and node_name.

tools.name: connect_material_expressions
tools.description: Connect two MaterialExpression nodes. Provide material_path, from_node, from_output, to_node, to_input.

tools.name: connect_material_property
tools.description: Connect a node to a Material property input (BaseColor, Roughness, Normal, etc). Provide material_path, from_node, from_output, material_property.

tools.name: set_expression_property
tools.description: Set an editor property on a MaterialExpression node. Provide material_path, node_name, property_name, property_value.

tools.name: set_expression_position
tools.description: Move a MaterialExpression node position in graph. Provide material_path, node_name, pos_x, pos_y.

tools.name: set_material_properties
tools.description: Set top-level Material properties (BlendMode, ShadingModel, TwoSided, etc). Provide material_path and properties dict.

tools.name: recompile_material
tools.description: Recompile a Material with auto-validation. Checks shader instruction count to verify success. Only saves on successful compile. Provide material_path.
